titleStmt.title: SII 19.395: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 395. (A.R. No. 128 of 1914.) TIRUVEṞUMBŪR, TIRUCHIRAPALLI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, PIPĪLIKĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records an endowment of three plots of land called the Kayilāya-vayakkal Gaṇavadi-vayakkal and Araiśi-vayakkal for the requirements of offerings during the ardhayāma service in the temple of Tirumalaiyāḷvār at Tiruveṟumbiyūr in Kaviranāḍu by the ūrār (assembly) of the place. This is probably an inscription of Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu
10 6Āvatu kaviranāṭṭu tiruverumpiyū
r Ūrom Eṅkaḷ tiruveṟumpiyūrt ti
rumalaiyāḷvārkku Arddhayāmam Amutu
ceyya vaitta poṉakappaḻavarici nāḻi po
rikkaṟiyamutu 1 neyyamutu Orupiṭiyum
tayiramutu nāḻiyu Aṭaikkāyamutu Āṟum Ilaiyamutu Oraṭukkum Āka Ippaṭi ca
n=tirātittavaṟ ceyya vaitta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷūr miyūrk kayilāyavayakkalukku
m kaṇavativayakkalukkum Icaitta kiḻpāṟkellai vaṭakkunokkippoṉa vāykkā
lukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai talaivāy ṉilattukku vaṭakkum talaivāy ṉilattu
kku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai kāṉāṟṟukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai kucavaṉilattu
kkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kuṇṭukuṭaiyā ṉakkaṉ cātta nilattukkum mañcaṉ
(caṉ) cantira ṉi
lattukku
teṟkkum Araicivayakkalukku kiḻpāṟkellai vāykkālu
kku meṟkkum vāykkālukku vaṭakkum cantiraṉ piṭāra ṉilattu
kkum kiḻakkum kolla ṉilattukku teṟkkum Āka Iraṇṭu ki
nilam Iṟaiyili cantrātittavaṟ Uṇṇila moḻiviṉṟi tiruveṟumpiyūr malaiy
tevarkku kuṭuttom tiruveṟumpiyūrarom panmāheśvararakṣai ....
Digital edition of SII 19.395 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
